/usr/bin/ar qc libRST.a CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/crypto/SHA256.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/Format/Formatter.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/LogLevel.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/LogRegistry.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/Logger.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/Sinks/ConsoleSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/Sinks/FileSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/log/Sinks/RotatingFileSink.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/parser/ArgParser.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/string/Join.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/string/Split.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/string/ToLower.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/string/ToUpper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/string/Trim.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/system/SystemInfo.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/threads/ThreadPool.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/time/FrameTimer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/RST.dir/src/time/Timer.cpp.o
/usr/bin/ranlib libRST.a
